title: minuartia lanceolata subsp. rupestris
intro: Minuartia lanceolata subsp. rupestris, also known as Alpine Pennycress, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae) and is native to Europe and North Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal activities, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and infections. The health benefits of Minuartia lanceolata subsp. rupestris include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote respiratory health. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, and can be dried or used fresh to extract its medicinal compounds.
